metadata.name: O365 Tenancy Snapshot Graph API & PowerShell Query Library
metadata.description: Automated discovery queries for M365 tenancy snapshot audit - Insurance Advisory sector
metadata.purpose: Phase 1 M365 Audit - Automated configuration discovery via Microsoft Graph API and PowerShell
metadata.usage: Run via Microsoft Graph PowerShell SDK, Exchange Online PowerShell, and SharePoint Online PowerShell

mfaStatus.name: MFA Registration Status
mfaStatus.description: Per-user MFA registration and method inventory

conditionalAccessPolicies.name: Conditional Access Policies
conditionalAccessPolicies.description: All Conditional Access policies with conditions and grants

directoryRoles.name: Directory Role Assignments
directoryRoles.description: All directory roles and their members

globalAdminCount.name: Global Administrator Count
globalAdminCount.description: Critical check - number of Global Administrators (benchmark: ≤5)
globalAdminCount.query:
$globalAdminRole = Get-MgDirectoryRole | Where-Object { $_.DisplayName -eq 'Global Administrator' }
$globalAdmins = Get-MgDirectoryRoleMember -DirectoryRoleId $globalAdminRole.Id
$globalAdmins | Select AdditionalProperties | ConvertTo-Json > exports/identity-global-admins.json
Write-Host "Global Admins: $($globalAdmins.Count)" -ForegroundColor $(if($globalAdmins.Count -gt 5){'Red'}else{'Green'})

guestUsers.name: Guest User Inventory
guestUsers.description: All external/guest users in the tenant
guestUsers.query: Get-MgUser -All -Filter "userType eq 'Guest'" | Select DisplayName, UserPrincipalName, CreatedDateTime, AccountEnabled, ExternalUserState | Export-Csv exports/identity-guest-users.csv -NoTypeInformation

pimStatus.name: Privileged Identity Management Status
pimStatus.description: Check if PIM is enabled and configured (requires P2 licensing)

servicePrincipals.name: Service Principal Inventory
servicePrincipals.description: All registered service principals / app registrations
servicePrincipals.query: Get-MgServicePrincipal -All | Select DisplayName, AppId, ServicePrincipalType, AccountEnabled, SignInAudience | Export-Csv exports/identity-service-principals.csv -NoTypeInformation

signInRiskPolicies.name: Sign-In Risk Conditional Access Policies
signInRiskPolicies.description: Conditional Access policies configured with sign-in risk conditions

namedLocations.name: Named Locations
namedLocations.description: Trusted/named locations configured for Conditional Access

passwordPolicies.name: Password and Authentication Policies
passwordPolicies.description: Tenant password policies and authentication method settings
passwordPolicies.query:
Get-MgPolicyAuthorizationPolicy | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 > exports/identity-password-policies.json
Get-MgPolicyAuthenticationMethodPolicy | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 >> exports/identity-auth-method-policy.json

transportRules.name: Transport / Mail Flow Rules
transportRules.description: All mail flow rules including forwarding, redirect, and modification rules
transportRules.query: Get-TransportRule | Select Name, State, Priority, SentToScope, FromScope, Mode, Description | Export-Csv exports/exchange-transport-rules.csv -NoTypeInformation

forwardingRules.name: External Forwarding Rules (HIGH RISK)
forwardingRules.description: Mail flow rules that redirect, BCC, or copy mail externally
forwardingRules.query: Get-TransportRule | Where-Object { $_.RedirectMessageTo -ne $null -or $_.BlindCopyTo -ne $null -or $_.CopyTo -ne $null } | Select Name, State, RedirectMessageTo, BlindCopyTo, CopyTo | Export-Csv exports/exchange-forwarding-rules.csv -NoTypeInformation

mailboxForwarding.name: Mailbox-Level Forwarding
mailboxForwarding.description: Individual mailboxes with forwarding configured (external exposure check)
mailboxForwarding.query: Get-Mailbox -ResultSize Unlimited | Where-Object { $_.ForwardingSmtpAddress -ne $null -or $_.ForwardingAddress -ne $null } | Select DisplayName, PrimarySmtpAddress, ForwardingSmtpAddress, ForwardingAddress, DeliverToMailboxAndForward | Export-Csv exports/exchange-mailbox-forwarding.csv -NoTypeInformation

antiPhishPolicies.name: Anti-Phishing Policies
antiPhishPolicies.description: Anti-phishing policy configuration including impersonation protection
antiPhishPolicies.query: Get-AntiPhishPolicy | Select Name, Enabled, PhishThresholdLevel, EnableMailboxIntelligenceProtection, EnableOrganizationDomainsProtection, EnableTargetedDomainsProtection, EnableTargetedUserProtection | Export-Csv exports/exchange-antiphish-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

antiSpamPolicies.name: Anti-Spam Policies
antiSpamPolicies.description: Hosted content filter and connection filter policies
antiSpamPolicies.query: Get-HostedContentFilterPolicy | Select Name, SpamAction, HighConfidenceSpamAction, BulkSpamAction, BulkThreshold, QuarantineRetentionPeriod | Export-Csv exports/exchange-antispam-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

dkimConfig.name: DKIM Signing Configuration
dkimConfig.query: Get-DkimSigningConfig | Select Domain, Enabled, Status | Export-Csv exports/exchange-dkim-status.csv -NoTypeInformation

dmarcSpfRecords.name: DMARC and SPF DNS Records
dmarcSpfRecords.description: DNS record checks for all verified domains (DMARC, SPF)

safeAttachments.name: Safe Attachments Policies
safeAttachments.description: Defender for Office 365 Safe Attachments configuration (requires P1/P2)

safeLinks.name: Safe Links Policies
safeLinks.description: Defender for Office 365 Safe Links configuration (requires P1/P2)

auditLogConfig.name: Unified Audit Log Configuration
auditLogConfig.description: Check if unified audit log ingestion is enabled (critical for compliance)
auditLogConfig.query: Get-AdminAuditLogConfig | Select UnifiedAuditLogIngestionEnabled, AdminAuditLogEnabled, AdminAuditLogCmdlets, AdminAuditLogParameters | ConvertTo-Json > exports/exchange-audit-log-config.json

organizationConfig.name: Exchange Organization Configuration
organizationConfig.query: Get-OrganizationConfig | Select Name, IsDehydrated, OAuth2ClientProfileEnabled, DefaultGroupAccessType, MailTipsAllTipsEnabled, MailTipsExternalRecipientsTipsEnabled, MailTipsGroupMetricsEnabled | ConvertTo-Json > exports/exchange-org-config.json

tenantSettings.name: SharePoint Tenant Settings
tenantSettings.description: Tenant-level SharePoint Online sharing and configuration
tenantSettings.query:
Connect-SPOService -Url https://<tenant>-admin.sharepoint.com
Get-SPOTenant | Select SharingCapability, DefaultSharingLinkType, DefaultLinkPermission, RequireAcceptingAccountMatchInvitedAccount, ExternalUserExpirationRequired, ExternalUserExpireInDays, OneDriveSharingCapability, PreventExternalUsersFromResharing, FileAnonymousLinkType, FolderAnonymousLinkType | ConvertTo-Json > exports/sharepoint-tenant-settings.json

siteInventory.name: Site Collection Inventory
siteInventory.description: All SharePoint site collections with sharing and storage details
siteInventory.query: Get-SPOSite -Limit All | Select Title, Url, Template, StorageQuota, StorageUsageCurrent, SharingCapability, Owner, LastContentModifiedDate, ConditionalAccessPolicy | Export-Csv exports/sharepoint-sites.csv -NoTypeInformation

externalSharingSummary.name: External Sharing Summary
externalSharingSummary.description: Site collections grouped by sharing capability
externalSharingSummary.query:
$sites = Get-SPOSite -Limit All
$sharingSummary = $sites | Group-Object SharingCapability | Select Name, Count | Sort-Object Count -Descending
$sharingSummary | Export-Csv exports/sharepoint-sharing-summary.csv -NoTypeInformation

oneDriveSettings.name: OneDrive Settings
oneDriveSettings.query: Get-SPOTenant | Select OneDriveSharingCapability, OneDriveStorageQuota, OrphanedPersonalSitesRetentionPeriod, BlockDownloadLinksFileType, DisablePersonalListCreation | ConvertTo-Json > exports/onedrive-settings.json

externalAccess.name: Teams External Access Policies
externalAccess.query: Get-CsExternalAccessPolicy | Select Identity, EnableFederationAccess, EnableTeamsConsumerAccess, EnableTeamsConsumerInbound | Export-Csv exports/teams-external-access.csv -NoTypeInformation

guestConfig.name: Teams Guest Access Configuration
guestConfig.description: Guest user access settings for Teams
guestConfig.query: Get-CsTeamsClientConfiguration | Select AllowGuestUser, AllowDropBox, AllowBox, AllowGoogleDrive, AllowShareFile, AllowEgnyte | ConvertTo-Json > exports/teams-guest-config.json

meetingPolicies.name: Teams Meeting Policies
meetingPolicies.description: Meeting policies including anonymous access and recording
meetingPolicies.query: Get-CsTeamsMeetingPolicy | Select Identity, AllowAnonymousUsersToJoinMeeting, AllowExternalParticipantGiveRequestControl, AutoAdmittedUsers, AllowCloudRecording, AllowOutlookAddIn, AllowPrivateMeetNow | Export-Csv exports/teams-meeting-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

messagingPolicies.name: Teams Messaging Policies
messagingPolicies.description: Messaging policies including URL previews and external communication
messagingPolicies.query: Get-CsTeamsMessagingPolicy | Select Identity, AllowUrlPreviews, AllowGiphy, AllowMemes, ReadReceiptsEnabledType, ChannelsInChatListEnabledType, AllowUserEditMessage, AllowUserDeleteMessage | Export-Csv exports/teams-messaging-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

appPermissionPolicies.name: Teams App Permission Policies
appPermissionPolicies.query: Get-CsTeamsAppPermissionPolicy | Select Identity, DefaultCatalogAppsType, GlobalCatalogAppsType, PrivateCatalogAppsType | Export-Csv exports/teams-app-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

dlpPolicies.name: DLP Policies
dlpPolicies.description: Data Loss Prevention policies and their configuration
dlpPolicies.query: Get-DlpCompliancePolicy | Select Name, Mode, Enabled, Priority, Workload, CreatedBy, WhenCreated | Export-Csv exports/compliance-dlp-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

dlpRules.name: DLP Rules
dlpRules.description: DLP rule definitions with sensitive information types
dlpRules.query: Get-DlpComplianceRule | Select Name, Policy, Disabled, ContentContainsSensitiveInformation, BlockAccess, NotifyUser | Export-Csv exports/compliance-dlp-rules.csv -NoTypeInformation

sensitivityLabels.name: Sensitivity Labels
sensitivityLabels.query: Get-Label | Select DisplayName, Name, Priority, ContentType, Enabled, ParentLabelDisplayName | Export-Csv exports/compliance-sensitivity-labels.csv -NoTypeInformation

retentionPolicies.name: Retention Policies
retentionPolicies.query: Get-RetentionCompliancePolicy | Select Name, Enabled, Mode, Workload, RetentionDuration, RetentionAction | Export-Csv exports/compliance-retention-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

alertPolicies.name: Alert Policies
alertPolicies.query: Get-ProtectionAlert | Select Name, Category, Severity, IsEnabled, NotifyUser, Operation | Export-Csv exports/compliance-alert-policies.csv -NoTypeInformation

secureScoreControls.name: Secure Score Control Profiles
secureScoreControls.description: Individual secure score controls and their implementation status
secureScoreControls.query: Get-MgSecuritySecureScoreControlProfile -All | Select Id, Title, ImplementationStatus, Score, MaxScore, Service, Category, ActionType | Export-Csv exports/security-score-controls.csv -NoTypeInformation

licensing.name: Licensing Inventory
licensing.description: Subscribed SKUs to determine available security features
licensing.query: Get-MgSubscribedSku | Select SkuPartNumber, CapabilityStatus, ConsumedUnits, @{N='TotalUnits';E={$_.PrepaidUnits.Enabled}}, @{N='AvailableUnits';E={$_.PrepaidUnits.Enabled - $_.ConsumedUnits}} | Export-Csv exports/security-licensing.csv -NoTypeInformation

securityDefaults.name: Security Defaults Status
securityDefaults.description: Check if security defaults are enabled or disabled (CA should replace)

graphConnect.name: Connect to Microsoft Graph
graphConnect.description: Establish Graph API session with required scopes
